source: DFM reference + MCP availability; GIFs from proposal_contract/GIFs

CD-1.description: Agent uses retention/analytics APIs or MCP for curve calibration; script input via Notion or chat. Output: retention curve, flags, suggestions. MCP: optional Notion MCP for script context.

CD-2.description: Agent or scheduled job fetches competitor data (YouTube API or ViewStats); aggregates outliers; Slack MCP or webhook for digest. Multiple tools bound: data source + Slack.

CD-3.description: Thumbnail + title → vision + search APIs; Slack MCP for command response. Agent: reasoning → score + thumbnail text candidates.

CD-4.description: Monitor competitor channels; detect title/thumbnail/description changes; compute performance delta; Slack MCP for alerts. Multiple tools: YouTube + Slack.

CD-5.description: Slack command → title + thumbnail → vision API → score + roast. Slack MCP or incoming webhook for response.

CD-6.description: Per-client Claude Project or Notion KB; agent has context via MCP (Notion) or Claude Project. Query → on-brand suggestions.

CD-7.description: Draft script + voice examples → LLM; output rewritten script. Notion MCP for read/write scripts.

CD-8.description: Slack MCP: receive message (title/hook) → call predictive scoring API → respond in thread. Agent or serverless function.

CD-9.description: Per-client outlier aggregation; dashboard or Notion MCP for display. Data from YouTube/ViewStats API.

ED-1.description: Frame.io API (or custom MCP) for comments; sentiment analysis; Slack MCP for alerts when below threshold. Multiple tools: Frame.io + Slack.

ED-2.description: Video file + checklist (from ClickUp/Notion MCP or API) → QC service → timestamped report. ClickUp MCP for checklist fetch.

ED-3.description: Agent: ClickUp MCP (list_tasks, get_assignees) + availability/skill data → suggested assignees; HITL confirm; ClickUp MCP update_task for assignment.

PR-1.description: Inputs (content type, deliverables, complexity) → schedule logic; output to ClickUp via API or ClickUp MCP (create tasks, set dates).

PR-2.description: Agent has Slack MCP, email API, Frame.io API; aggregates client comms → sentiment profile; flags to Producer. Multiple tools bound in one agent.

PR-3.description: Slack MCP + template engine; variables from ClickUp/Notion MCP (client, project). Workflow Builder or bot trigger.

PR-4.description: Natural language → Agent (OpenAI Agents SDK) → ClickUp MCP (create_task, list_lists, get_custom_fields); HITL confirm; task created. Slack MCP optional for trigger.
